programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Moving Castle! The Top Executive Pica Rises Up!

programme.title: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dragon Claw Strikes! Lucy's Intimidating Attack!

programme.title: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Defeat Sugar! The Army of the Little People Charges!

programme.title: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Last Light of Hope! The Secret of Our Commander!

programme.title: Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Rupture Human! Gladius Blows Up Big Time!

programme.title: With the Tontattas beaten, Robin turned into a toy, and Luffy, Franky, and the others busy elsewhere, Usopp is the last hope for Operation SOP! But will he be able to muster the confidence and courage to face the terrible Trebol?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Liar! Usoland on the Run!

programme.title: Usopp runs into trouble in his battle with Treebol, and flashback sheds light on how a young Kyros made the shocking transition from murderer to one of King Riku's most trusted men.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Fateful Encounter! Kyros and King Riku!

programme.title: In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Operation Failed! Usoland the Hero Dies?!

programme.title: Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Legend is Back! Kyros' All-out Blow!

programme.title: Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Fire Fist Strikes! The Flare-Flare Fruit Power Returns!

programme.title: Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dashing onto the Scene! The Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army - Sabo!

programme.title: The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Devil's Trap! A Dressrosa Extermination Plan!

programme.title: As the people of Dressrosa see their friends and loved ones slaughter each other under the manipulation of Doflamingo, memories of 10 years ago rush back, and the truth of that event becomes clear. Doflamingo announces the rules for his deadly game.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The 500 Million Berry Man! Target: Usoland!

programme.title: Doflamingo and Fujitora's agreement to not engage each other lasts for the moment - meaning all eyes are turned towards taking down the Straw Hats and claiming the rewards! And as Luffy starts heading to the Royal Palace, Fujitora stands in his way!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Breaking through Enemy Lines! Luffy and Zoro Launch the Counter-Attack!

programme.title: Robin, Usopp, the Tontattas and the others make moves to rejoin Luffy as Doflamingo's deadly game rages on! Meanwhile, Kin'emon makes it to the trash heap in his search for his friend Kanjuro - just as Pica emerges in the town.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: With a Rumbling of the Ground! The God of Destruction - Giant Pica Descends!

programme.title: With Luffy & the others recovering from Pica's attack, the game is afoot! Luffy has just enough time to regroup and set out to find Doflamingo, only to find that the dastardly Warlord has more enemies than he might realize! A strange argument breaks out.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Gathering into a Powerful Front! Luffy and a Group of Brutal Warriors!

programme.title: Don Chin Jao and Elizabello successfully break Pica's giant arm but the rock giant is unfazed and starts throwing even more destructive punches at Luffy and his band of unwanted collaborators! Meanwhile, Navy Admiral Fujitora moves into action.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Steady Progress! Luffy’s Army vs. Pica!

programme.title: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Shocking Confession! Law's Soulful Vow!

programme.title: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Big Collision! Chief of Staff - Sabo vs. Admiral Fujitora!

programme.title: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Desperate Situation! Luffy Gets Caught in a Trap!

programme.title: Penned in at the bottom of a well, Luffy and Law are caught in a trap! But someone has come to save them who they least expect! Meanwhile, the Tontattas help Franky break in to the SMILE factory, and Bartolomeo resorts to tactics he used in the Colosseum.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Great Escape! Luffy's Tide-turning Elephant Gun!

programme.title: The Tontattas locate their captive comrades and seem to be able to get the message to them - the prison break is on! Meanwhile, heavy-hitters from the Colosseum turn from wringing each other's necks towards a unified plan.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A United Front! Luffy's Breakthrough to the Victory!

programme.title: Hidden far underground, Kin'emon finds his old friend Kanjuro whose powers allow the two to, quickly, but not elegantly, escape to the surface! Meanwhile, Cavendish shares his fears that the "Birdcage" game Doflamingo is playing has been rigged all along.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Second Samurai! Evening Shower Kanjuro Appears!

programme.title: The Tontattas are in full revolt! But can they keep their wits about them long enough to make it out? Meanwhile, Zoro finally gains the upper hand against Pica, and Franky finds a way to deal with Señor Pink.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Hard-Fought Battle Against Pica! Zoro's Deadly Attack!

programme.title: Franky finally makes it into the factory and the Tontattas are reunited with their captive friends! But Princess Mansherry is nowhere to be found. Factory manager Kuween becomes irate when ignored and launches an attack on Franky.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Little People's Princess! Captive Mansherry!

programme.title: Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo draw closer to the Flower Field on the fourth level of the Royal Palace plateau, but a sudden attack by Gladius' exploding spheres sends Robin and Bartolomeo hurtling towards the level below.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Invincible! A Gruesome Army of Headcracker Dolls!

programme.title: Rebecca makes it to the Flower Field alone, but unfortunately finds company there that is less than friendly! Meanwhile, Bartolomeo pushes himself to the limit in order to help Luffy advance, but does he leave himself vulnerable in the process?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Risking Their Lives! Luffy is the Trump Card for Victory!

programme.title: Diamante has Rebecca pinned and completely overpowered. If only the Soldier-san of her youth were able to protect her! Meanwhile, Luffy and Law finally surmount incredible odds to land themselves in striking distance of Doflamingo.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Tearful Reunion! Rebecca and Kyros!

programme.title: Usopp uses Viola's Clairvoyance to prepare his ammunition to take Sugar out! But the slightest hesitation now will spell disaster, and the end of Luffy! Luckily for the Straw Hats, Usopp's ammunition has been specially designed for this situation!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: One Shot One Kill! The Man Who Will Save Dressrosa!

programme.title: The final showdown with Doflamingo begins, but the Warlord still has several tricks up his sleeve - including turning one of Luffy's own friends against him! Meanwhile Franky and Señor Pink are in a standoff to find out who is the coolest.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Anger Erupts! Luffy and Law's Ultimate Stratagem!

programme.title: The One, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: In a stunning dual role, international action star Jet Li portrays Gabriel Yulaw, a police officer confronted with a sinister form of himself escaped from an advanced, parallel universe and intent on killing Gabriel.

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Action)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Cloverfield, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: The One, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: In a stunning dual role, international action star Jet Li portrays Gabriel Yulaw, a police officer confronted with a sinister form of himself escaped from an advanced, parallel universe and intent on killing Gabriel.

programme.title: I.S.S., (2024, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a world war event occurs on Earth, America and Russia, both nations secretly contact their astronauts aboard the ISS and give them instructions to take control of the station by any means necessary.

programme.title: Cyborg, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell, (1995, Anime Feature Films)
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Cloverfield, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: El Dorado, (1966, Western)
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum plays to perfection an alcoholic but gutsy sheriff who relentlessly battles the dark side of the wild West, ruthless cattle barons and crooked “businessmen.”

programme.title: Rio Lobo, (1970, Western)
programme.desc: This fifth and final collaboration between John Wayne and director Howard Hawks is an action-filled Western set after the Civil War, in which a group of men seek out Union traitors responsible for a string of train robbers.

programme.title: McLintock!, (1963, Western)
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain, (1938, Western)
programme.desc: Rancher Gene Autry and his pal Frog Millhouse come to the aid of ranchers and townfolk who are swindled by fake mining promoters into buying parcels of a ghost town with the promise of electricity from the nearby Boulder Dam.

programme.title: Prairie Moon, (1938, Western)
programme.desc: When Deputy Sheriff Gene Autry agrees to become the guardian of a dying friend's three young sons from Chicago, he soon learns that the boys are a pack of ruffians and not the least bit impressed with cowboys and ranch life.

programme.title: Western Jamboree, (1938, Western)
programme.desc: Ranch foreman Gene Autry, with the help of Frog Millhouse, turns the Circle J Ranch into a dude ranch to help an old friend fool his daughter's rich fiance into believing he is a wealthy rancher.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks, (1961, Western)
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured but Rio escapes and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: The Way West, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Gunfight At The O.K. Corral, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Nicholas Nickleby, (2002, Drama)
programme.desc: After Nicholas' father dies and leaves the Familyy penniless, the Nickleby Family moves to London to stay with their Uncle Ralph. Ralph turns abusive and separates the family.

programme.title: Song One, (2014, Indie Romance)
programme.desc: Estranged from her family, Franny returns home when an accident leaves her brother comatose. Retracing his life as an aspiring singer-songwriter.

programme.title: Rachel Getting Married, (2008, Drama)
programme.desc: When Kym, returns to the Buchman family home for the wedding of her sister Rachel, she brings a long history of personal crises, family conflict, and tragedy along with her. Rated -R

programme.title: Rules of Engagement, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: Colonel Terry Childers is a patriot and war hero. But when a peacekeeping mission he leads in Yemen goes terribly wrong, he finds himself facing a court-martial.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, War Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: Colonel Terry Childers is a patriot and war hero. But when a peacekeeping mission he leads in Yemen goes terribly wrong, he finds himself facing a court-martial.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, War Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi, Mako, and Ami see a boy attacked by one of Ail and An’s Cardian monsters. To Mako’s surprise, the boy turns out to be her childhood friend.
programme.sub-title: For Whom Is the White Rose? The Moonlight Knight Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi goes to a virtual reality arcade in the Juban District, where she unexpectedly runs into Mamoru, as well as Seijuro and Natsumi.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Crisis: The Tiara Stops Working

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends are enjoying the cherry blossoms when the Cardian Leshy attacks. The Sailor Guardians are caught.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako befriends a little girl named Mie who is a huge fan of Sailor Moon. Meanwhile, Ail and An send a Cardian to steal energy from young children.
programme.sub-title: The Targeted Kindergarteners: Venus to the Rescue

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Mamoru find themselves looking after a baby boy while his mother is recovering from having her energy stolen by a Cardian.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A school festival is going to be held at T.A. Girls’ Academy, which Rei attends. Usagi and Ami go to check up on her.
programme.sub-title: The School Festival Is for Me?! Queen Rei's Song

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami and Makoto are trying to figure out who the Moonlight Knight is. Makoto volunteers to investigate by getting closer to Seijuro.
programme.sub-title: Is Seijuro the Moonlight Knight? Mako on Fire

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls get into an argument over who gets to play Snow White in the upcoming play with Mamoru.
programme.sub-title: Steal a Kiss from Mamoru: An's Project Snow White

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Natsumi both get detention after angering Ms. Haruna during class. The two start working on their assignment when a Cardian shows up.
programme.sub-title: After-School Trouble: Usagi Is a Target

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ail and An learn that the Makai Tree is beginning to die. Usagi and her friends visit Natsumi after hearing that Natsumi is not feeling well.
programme.sub-title: Disconnecting Love: The Raging Makai Tree

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: While visiting Seijuro and Natsumi's apartment, Usagi and Mamoru come under attack by the Makai Tree.
programme.sub-title: True Love Awakens: The Makai Tree's Secret

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious girl suddenly falls down from the sky. Calling herself 'Usagi,' the girl demands Usagi to tell her where the Silver Crystal is.
programme.sub-title: Angel or Devil? The Mysterious Girl from the Sky

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi wakes up to find that Chibi-Usa has gone missing. Meeting up with Mamoru, the two search for Chibi-Usa, finding her alone at the park.
programme.sub-title: Usagi Devastated: Mamoru Declares a Break-Up

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami is offered a chance to study abroad in Germany. Knowing how important this is to her, Usagi and the others urge Ami to accept the offer.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei's grandfather is upset that Hikawa Shrine has had fewer female visitors lately. He then decides to retire as head priest to start a new business.
programme.sub-title: Women Must Be Strong and Beautiful: Rei's New Special Technique

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rubeus sends down Petz and her Droid to search and capture Chibi-Usa. Chibi-Usa is calling someone telling her she wants to go home.
programme.sub-title: In Search of the Silver Crystal: Chibi-Usa's Secret

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako and Makoto clash over their opposing views on love. Usagi takes the girls to a accessory shop, unaware that Petz and Calaveras run the place.
programme.sub-title: Dispute Over Love: Minako and Makoto's Conflict

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa's class is having a parent-child curry party. After hearing that neither Kenji nor Ikuko can attend, Usagi decides to go in their place.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Parental Love: The Curry Romance Triangle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls enjoy some vacation time on an island. Chibi-Usa and Rei get into a small fight, causing an angry Chibi-Usa to go out to the sea alone.
programme.sub-title: The Beach, the Island and a Vacation: The Guardians' Break

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa leaves the house after being scolded by Usagi. Chibi-Usa begins to cry, which draws the attention of Rubeus and the Four Spectre Sisters.
programme.sub-title: Protect Chibi-Usa: Clash of the Ten Warriors

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mamoru has a dream which a voice warns him that being with Usagi will bring her great misfortune. Meanwhile, Sailor Moon is attacked by a Droid.
programme.sub-title: Awaken the Sleeping Beauty: Mamoru's Distress

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Wiseman predicts that Chibi-Usa will appear at Hikawa Shrine. Learning of this, Rubeus orders Koan to go down there and eliminate their target.
programme.sub-title: Battle of the Flames of Love! Mars vs. Koan

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami enters the World Chess Tournament, but Bertheir is also there, forcing Ami to transform and reveal her identity as a Sailor Guardian to the enemy.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rubeus gives Petz and Calaveras one last chance to eliminate Rabbit and the Sailor Guardians once and for all.
programme.sub-title: Rubeus the Heartless: The Tragic Sisters

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa learns that Usagi is Sailor Moon. Eager to return to the future, she steals Usagi's Silver Crystal and flees, only to be ambushed by Rubeus.
programme.sub-title: A UFO Appears: The Sailor Guardians Abducted

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rubeus succeeds in taking four of the five Sailor Guardians prisoner. He demands that Sailor Moon bring Chibi-Usa and the Silver Crystal to him.
programme.sub-title: Defeat Rubeus: The Battle in Space

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa falls into a coma. Usagi and the others are at a loss, when a Sailor Guardian calling herself Sailor Pluto suddenly appears before them.
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious New Guardian: Sailor Pluto Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Black Moon clan sends down its next operative, Esmeraude, to open the Dark Gate in 20th century Tokyo.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is still depressed over Mamoru calling off their relationship. Ami and Mako try to cheer her up by taking Usagi to a promise ring workshop.
programme.sub-title: Shared Feelings: Usagi and Mamoru in Love Once Again

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A strange new flu is causing everyone to get sick, including the Sailor Guardians. Minako takes it upon herself to look after her sick friends.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Artemis is out to prove he is capable after being teased by Luna. He encounters a suspicious-looking man who is gathering stray animals.
programme.sub-title: Artemis's Adventure: The Monster Animal Kingdom

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The school test results are posted, and Ami is at the top of her class. She finds herself becoming isolated after rumors that she cheated on the test.
programme.sub-title: The Terrifying Illusion: Ami All Alone

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: After being out sick, Chibi-Usa returns to school eager to see her friends. But to her surprise, her friends and teachers begin attacking her.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Gate Is Completed? The Targeted Elementary School

programme.title: Den of Thieves, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: An elite unit of the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department squares off against a crew of ex-military men who hatch an elaborate plan for a seemingly impossible heist -- the city's Federal Reserve Bank.

programme.title: Dragged Across Concrete, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Police partners descend into the criminal underworld after they are suspended for assaulting a suspect on video.

programme.title: Brooklyn's Finest, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: In the course of one chaotic week, the lives of three conflicted New York City police officers are dramatically transformed by their involvement in a massive drug operation.

programme.title: Fire With Fire, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A firefighter does something unexpected after a man that he has been ordered to testify against threatens him.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: The Cimmerian warrior slashes his way across Hyboria on a mission that begins as a personal vendetta but turns into an epic battle against a supernatural evil.

programme.title: Solomon Kane, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A man (James Purefoy) must renounce his newly taken vows of peace to rescue a young woman (Rachel Hurd-Wood) from an evil sorcerer (Jason Flemyng).

programme.title: Outlander, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: An alien soldier (James Caviezel) crashes on Earth during the time of the Vikings and blends his technology with theirs to hunt his enemy.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Betrayed by his stepfather, the King, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: The House Of The Spirits, (1993, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Based on Isabel Allende's best-selling novel, is a hauntingly romantic tale spanning three generations of the Trueba family. At its core is the stormy passionate relationship between the supernaturally gifted Clara and her controlling husband Esteban

programme.title: Os Grandes Guerreiros, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Baseado na história escrita por Wing-Shing Ma, desta vez, Wind e Cloud têm de enfrentar Lord Godless, um poderoso guerreiro chinês que quer conquistar a China, e seu filho Heart. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Invasão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois que sua pequena cidade australiana é aniquilada por um ataque alienígena avassalador, um grupo de civis foge da captura e descobre que agora estão entre os últimos sobreviventes de uma invasão extraterrestre que engolfou todo o planeta. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Último Herói, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quinze anos atrás, Andrei foi treinado como espião em uma escola especial secreta. Hoje ele tenta esquecer seu passado, mas seu pai, que se acreditava morto, entra em contato, levando-o em uma busca desesperada. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Salvando o General Yang, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Sete irmãos Yang têm a tarefa de resgatar seu pai, mantido prisioneiro após ir para a batalha com um velho inimigo vingativo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Lenda do Mestre Chinês, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um jovem estudante se apaixona por uma bela mulher, sem saber que ela é uma serpente branca que tem forma humana. Um monge intervém para salvar a alma do jovem, prendendo a serpente branca em um poço profundo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Entre Amigos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No Queens, um grupo prepara uma despedida de solteiro para seu amigo de infância, Ray. No entanto, o noivo anda tendo dúvidas e não tem certeza se haverá casamento. Durante a festa, há descobertas para a maioria deles. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Adorável Professora, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma professora reencontra seu antigo aluno, Jason, que sonha em ser autor de teatro. Para ajudá-lo, Linda resolve encenar a peça escrita por ele na escola em que trabalha. A parti daí, ela começa a perceber que sente algo mais por Jason. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Química do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma dedicada cientista, determinada a resolver a guerra dos sexos, arrisca sua própria felicidade para provar que a ciência explica tudo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Segredos de Guerra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No auge da Guerra Fria, um soldado problemático forma um triângulo amoroso proibido com um piloto de caça e sua companheira em uma base da força aérea soviética. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sombras do Terror, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Adolescente que mora com o avô abusivo tenta proteger o melhor amigo contra os valentões da escola. Ao descobrir uma criatura assassina em seu galpão de ferramentas, ele e o colega bolam um plano de vingança. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Ó Paí, Ó, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em um animado cortiço do centro histórico do Pelourinho, em Salvador, tudo é compartilhado pelos seus moradores, especialmente a paixão pelo Carnaval e a antipatia pela síndica do prédio, Dona Joana. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: De Volta ao Fundo do Mar, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O pequeno peixe Kevin é apanhado em uma rede e levado para um tanque em um restaurante de Nova York. Agora, ele deve encontrar uma maneira de voltar para casa e reencontrar sua família. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Bons pra Cachorro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Almôndega e Cassie, dois cães de estimação, precisam superar suas diferenças para evitar que ladrões assaltem a casa dos seus donos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ruslan, um artista sonha em se tornar um cavaleiro, se apaixona por Mila. A felicidade deles não dura muito tempo. Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Garoto-Formiga 3, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O Garoto-Formiga entra em sua adolescência e pensa em se aposentar, mas muda de ideia quando seu arqui-inimigo é liberto da prisão. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Você Acredita?, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um pastor é questionado por um morador de rua sobre sua crença em Deus, e passa a usar essa pergunta com seus fiéis também. A partir daí, doze histórias diferentes se cruzam, cada uma com sua provação sobre até onde vai a fé em Deus. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Deus Não Está Morto - Uma Luz na Escuridão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um incêndio atinge a Igreja de Saint James, devastando a congregação e o Pastor Dave, e a universidade vizinha usa a tragédia para tentar despejar a congregação de seu campus. Dave recorre a seu irmão, um advogado ateu, para tentar reerguer a igreja. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Póstumo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Liam é um artista frustrado que finge sua morte para valorizar suas obras. O plano é um sucesso, mas ele não sabe por quanto tempo conseguirá manter a farsa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 2020. Protegendo Sakura, que não consegue mais se mover, Lee luta contra os três ninja do Som. Ele usa sua habilidade secreta, mas é ineficaz. Dosu o ataca, e Lee cai. Para proteger as pessoas que são importantes para ela, Sakura se levanta... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Sakura Floresce - T01E32

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Sakura se defende dos ninjas do Som sozinha, o time rival Ino aparece! Depois de ver Sakura lutar contra os ninjas do Som, eles decidem ajudá-la. Com a formação de batalha "Ino-Shika-Cho", o time Ino tenta deter os atacantes… Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Formação De Batalha: Ino-Shika-Cho - T01E33

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas do Som partem depois de enfrentar o poder de Sasuke. O time de Naruto tem um momento para se recuperar. Kiba consegue o segundo pergaminho e seu time vai em direção à torre. O parceiro canino de Kiba, Akamaru, nota algo adiante e para. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara
programme.desc: Naruto: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara - T01E34

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e a equipe finalmente descansam. Já se passaram quatro dias desde o início da prova, restando apenas um para o fim. Naruto sugere duplicar o pergaminho do céu, que ainda precisam ter, e tenta abrir o pergaminho da terra, supostamente selado. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar
programme.desc: Naruto: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar - T01E35

programme.title: 2020. O time de Naruto se junta a Kabuto, mas eles são presos por um genjutsu (técnica ilusória). Eles caminham na mesma área várias vezes, perdem energia e lutam contra os vários clones criados pela técnica. Naruto os derrota, mas o número não diminui. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus
programme.desc: Naruto: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus - T01E36

programme.title: 2020. Quando Naruto e seu time chegam à a torre e abrem os dois pergaminhos, Iruka aparece e explica o espírito do ninja chunin (nível médio) aos estudantes da Academia Ninja. Agora ele confia em Naruto e seu time. Anko fala com o Hokage sobre Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez
programme.desc: Naruto: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez - T01E37

programme.title: 2020. Os 21 ninjas que passaram na segunda parte da prova se juntam para o próximo desafio. Seus rostos demonstram várias emoções profundas. Mas como um número muito alto passou na segunda prova, as preliminares da terceira começarão imediatamente... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação!
programme.desc: Naruto: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação! - T01E38

programme.title: 2020. Na terceira prova os combates são um contra um. O primeiro é entre Sasuke e Yoroi, o capanga de Orochimaru. Yoroi encurrala Sasuke, que não consegue usar seu Sharingan por causa da Marca da Maldição no pescoço. Yoroi absorve o chakra para fora de Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta! - T01E39

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi desfaz o feitiço de Sasuke, e Orochimaru aparece. Ele quer o poder de Sharingan que o clã Uchiha possui. Nas preliminares da terceira prova, Zaku da Aldeia Escondida do Som luta contra Shino da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Kakashi E Orochimaru Cara A Cara
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi E Orochimaru Cara A Cara - T01E40

programme.title: 2020. O próximo combate é entre o membro do time de Gaara, Kankuro, e o capanga de Orochimaru, Misumi. Misumi captura Kankuro, usando um corpo que consegue deslocar suas partes e juntas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Explosão Kunoichi: As Rivais Se Enfrentam
programme.desc: Naruto: Explosão Kunoichi: As Rivais Se Enfrentam - T01E41

programme.title: 2020. O quarto combate é entre Sakura e Ino, amigas de infância e ambas apaixonadas por Sasuke. Embora Sakura tenha admirado Ino desde pequena, ela não hesita em enfrentá-la, e as duas ninjas aparentam ter o mesmo nível e determinação. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Final: Cha! - T01E42

programme.title: 2020. O quinto combate é entre Tenten e Temari. Tenten, mestre em armas aéreas e várias outras, que são repelidas pelo leque de Temari. O sexto combate é entre Shikamaru e Kin. Kin parece estar em vantagem, mas Shikamaru usa seu Jutsu Possessão da Sombra. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Kunoichi Assassina E Um Trêmulo Shikamaru
programme.desc: Naruto: A Kunoichi Assassina E Um Trêmulo Shikamaru - T01E43

programme.title: 2020. No sétimo combate, Naruto enfrenta Kiba, que traz seu cachorro Akamaru. Kiba usa o Jutsu Quatro Patas para atacar Naruto, que consegue virar a mesa. Entretanto, Akamaru e Kiba consomem Pílulas de Comida e começam um ataque intenso contra Naruto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Akamaru Se Revela, Quem É O Melhor Cachorro?
programme.desc: Naruto: Akamaru Se Revela, Quem É O Melhor Cachorro? - T01E44

programme.title: 2020. Depois de consumir Pílulas de Comida, os níveis de chakra de Kiba e Akamaru aumentam, e ambos começam a contra-atacar Naruto. Naruto usa Jutsu de Transformação contra Kiba e tenta ganhar com uma nova manobra secreta. O que será que Naruto planejou?! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto - T01E45

programme.title: 2020. No oitavo combate, os primos Hinata e Neji do clã Hyuga se enfrentam. Embora a tímida Hinata não seja páreo para a agressividade de Neji, ela consegue ganhar força ao escutar as palavras de Naruto. Como será que esta batalha terminará? Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha Byakugan: Hinata Ganha Coragem! - T01E46

programme.title: 2020. Hinata enfrenta Neji, mas ele ataca o ponto de pressão dela com Byakugan (olhos brancos). O fluxo de chakra de Hinata para, e ela quase perde a consciência. Ela encontra coragem ao lembrar como Naruto não desiste de nenhuma dificuldade. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Derrota Digna - T01E47

programme.title: 2020. No nono combate, Gaara finalmente aparece e seu oponente é Lee, um especialista em taijutsu (técnica física). Lee usa esta poderosa técnica contra Gaara, que manipula areia de sua cabaça. Então, a Armadura de Areia de Gaara finalmente se solta... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Gaara Conta Rock Lee, O Poder Da Juventude Explode
programme.desc: Naruto: Gaara Conta Rock Lee, O Poder Da Juventude Explode - T01E48

programme.title: 2020. Lee usa a técnica banida, Lótus Primária, para atacar Gaara. A luta parece ter terminado, mas a manobra apenas danifica a proteção feita pela areia de Gaara. Imóvel após de ter usado Lótus Primária, Lee é lançado facilmente por toda parte por Gaara. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Força Oculta De Lee: Um Jutsu Secreto Proibido
programme.desc: Naruto: A Força Oculta De Lee: Um Jutsu Secreto Proibido - T01E49

programme.title: 2020. Lee decide usar a manobra proibida, Lótus Oculta, que libera três ou mais dos oito portais que possuem a concentração dos pontos de chakra. Quando os oito portais se abrem, o usuário pode morrer. Mas Gaara responde com seu próprio ataque, Ataúde de Areia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Quinto Portão, Um Ninja Esplêndido
programme.desc: Naruto: O Quinto Portão, Um Ninja Esplêndido - T01E50

programme.title: 2020. No último combate das preliminares, Choji luta contra o capanga de Orochimaru, Dosu. As preliminares finalmente terminam, e o Hokage revela a terceira prova, enquanto Orochimaru começa secretamente seu plano maligno. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Sombra Na Escuridão: O Perigo Se Aproxima De Sasuke
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Sombra Na Escuridão: O Perigo Se Aproxima De Sasuke - T01E51

programme.title: 2020. Na preparação para a terceira prova, Kakashi escolhe Ebisu para treinar Naruto. Ebisu diz a Naruto que ele ainda não controla seu chakra o suficiente e o faz caminhar sobre água. Naruto aprende rápido e impressiona Ebisu. Então, uma figura aparece... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ebisu Volta: O Treinamento Mais Duro De Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto: Ebisu Volta: O Treinamento Mais Duro De Naruto - T01E52

programme.title: 2020. Jiraiya, um dos Sannin lendários, aparece de repente diante de Ebisu e Naruto. Naruto dá a Jiraiya o apelido de "Sábio Tarado". Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Após Muito Tempo...Jiraiya Retorna! - T01E53

programme.title: 2020. O ninja do Som, Dosu, aparece diante de Gaara e pretende derrotá-lo, mas o oposto acontece. Um jonin da Aldeia da Areia e Kabuto os observam secretamente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Jutsu De Invocação : A Sabedoria Do Sábio Do Sapo!
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu De Invocação : A Sabedoria Do Sábio Do Sapo! - T01E54

programme.title: 2020. Naruto continua seu treino com Jiraiya para dominar o Jutsu de Invocação, que chama várias criaturas selvagens. Mas ele tem dificuldades em controlar o Chacra da Raposa de Nove Caudas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Um Sentimento De Anseio, Uma Flor Cheia De Esperança
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Sentimento De Anseio, Uma Flor Cheia De Esperança - T01E55

programme.title: 2020. Já se passaram três semanas que Naruto treina com Jiraiya. E Naruto esteve a ponto de cair várias vezes. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Viva Ou Morra : Arrisque Tudo Para Ganhar Tudo
programme.desc: Naruto: Viva Ou Morra : Arrisque Tudo Para Ganhar Tudo - T01E56

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente realiza o Chacra de Nove Caudas e utiliza o Jutsu de Invocação. Gamabunta aparece e não acredita que Naruto o invocou. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ele Voa!Ele Salta!Ele Espreita!O Chefe Sapo Aparece!
programme.desc: Naruto: Ele Voa!Ele Salta!Ele Espreita!O Chefe Sapo Aparece! - T01E57

programme.sub-title: Hospital Sitiado : A Mão Do Mal Revelada!
programme.desc: Naruto: Hospital Sitiado : A Mão Do Mal Revelada! - T01E58

programme.title: 2020. O dia da prova chega finalmente. O primeiro oponente de Naruto é Neji Hyuga. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: As Rodadas Finais : A Corrida Para Arena De Batalha
programme.desc: Naruto: As Rodadas Finais : A Corrida Para Arena De Batalha - T01E59

programme.title: 2020. Finalmente, a Prova Chunin começa com oito ninjas que foram qualificados nas preliminares. Mas ninguém sabe onde Sasuke está. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: Byakugan Contra O Jutsu Clones Das Sombras! - T01E60

programme.desc: Naruto: A Derradeira Defesa : No Ponto Zero! - T01E61

programme.desc: Naruto: O Verdadeiro Poder Do Fracassado! - T01E62

programme.title: 2020. Derrotado por Naruto, Neji é levado para o hospital, quando o tio de Neji, Hiashi, aparece. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Bata Ou Desista ! As Rodadas Finais Ficam Complicadas!
programme.desc: Naruto: Bata Ou Desista ! As Rodadas Finais Ficam Complicadas! - T01E63

programme.title: 2020. A luta de Sasuke é adiada. É a vez de Shikamaru, mas ele não tem vontade de lutar por pensar que a luta dele seja apenas um combate secundário… Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: Folha Dançante, Areia Contorcida - T01E65

programme.title: 2020. A luta antecipada de Sasuke e Gaara começa. Gaara sinistramente fala com si mesmo, como se estivesse falando com outra pessoa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu Do Sobrancelhudo ... Stilo Sasuke! - T01E66

programme.title: 2020. Os movimentos e a velocidade de Sasuke são idênticas ao taijustu de Lee. Mas Gaara não é um oponente que pode ser derrotado somente por taijutsu. Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Naruto: “Atrasado Para O Show, Mas Pronto Para Lutar ...A Derradeira Técnica Secreta Nasce!" - T01E67

programme.desc: Naruto: Aldeia Em Angústia: Uma Nova Missão Nível “A” ! - T01E69

programme.desc: Naruto: Técnica Secreta Proibida ... Selo Ceifeiro Da Morte ! - T01E73

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E194

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E195

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E196

programme.desc: Beyblade Burst - T01E06

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: The case is coming to a close; Ray and Renee are backed against the wall and must make a deal with the devil; Shanes all-business approach brings sworn enemies together and a chance meeting helps Jackie pick a side in the coming battle.

programme.desc: A close encounter with mysterious lights sends two teens on the run after one discovers she has extraordinary but dangerous powers. Starring Stefanie Scott, Theodore Pellerin, Said Taghmaoui.

programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other mans private affairs. Starring Jake Gyllenhaal, Melanie Laurent, Isabella Rossellini.

programme.title: Heavenly Bodies
programme.desc: Samantha quits her job to open an aerobics studio and competes with a larger clubs lead instructor to become an aerobics instructor on a local fitness television show. Starring Cynthia Dale, Richard Rebiere, Walter George Alton.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus and the Sanctuary team attempt to capture a rare and deadly creature while under the watchful eye of a local news crew.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When abnormals begin assaulting humans, the Sanctuary team suspects an airborne virus or biological agent to be the cause.

programme.desc: Two sisters (Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen) print a personals ad on a billboard to find a match for their newly single father. Starring Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen, Tom Amandes.

programme.desc: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine. Starring Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Adrian Grenier.

programme.desc: Filmmakers Jennifer Baichwal, Nicholas de Pencier and Edward Burtynsky travel the globe to document the impact humans have made on the planet.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Pippi Longstocking
programme.desc: Reckless Pippi (Tami Erin) makes friends, walks on walls, spins fast and thwarts a wicked schoolmarm (Eileen Brennan). Starring Tami Erin, Eileen Brennan, Dennis Dugan.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Teenage Sarah (Jennifer Connelly) journeys through a maze to recover her baby brother (Toby Froud) from a goblin king (David Bowie). Starring David Bowie, Jennifer Connelly, Toby Froud.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: An ancient mask transforms a drab bank clerk (Jim Carrey) into a grinning Romeo with superhuman powers. Starring Jim Carrey, Cameron Diaz, Peter Riegert.

programme.title: Goosebumps
programme.desc: Author R.L. Stine (Jack Black), his young daughter (Odeya Rush) and their new neighbor (Dylan Minnette) must save the day when the monsters from the "Goosebumps" books magically come to life. Starring Jack Black, Dylan Minnette, Odeya Rush.

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: Best friends Sonny and Sam meet Slappy, a mischievous dummy who brings his ghoulish friends back to life -- just in time for Halloween. As the town becomes overrun with monsters, the boys join forces to save Sonnys mom and foil Slappys wicked plan. Starring Madison Iseman, Jeremy Ray Taylor, Wendi McLendon-Covey.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Ellen prepares for her wedding day; Julia attempts her escape.

programme.title: Good Fortune
programme.desc: A well-meaning but inept angel named Gabriel meddles in the lives of a struggling gig worker and a wealthy venture capitalist. Starring Seth Rogen, Aziz Ansari, Keke Palmer.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank (Seth Rogen) the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals. Starring Seth Rogen, Kristen Wiig, Jonah Hill.

programme.title: Dont You Forget About Me
programme.desc: Four filmmakers travel to Illinois to find filmmaker John Hughes.

programme.title: Fubar 2
programme.desc: Head bangers Terry (David Lawrence) and Dean (Paul J. Spence) are tired of barely scraping by and jump on an opportunity to go north and work on the pipelines during the holidays. Starring Dave Lawrence, Paul Spence, Gordon Skilling.

programme.title: Goon
programme.desc: Though a misfit among his brainy family members, Massachusetts bouncer Doug Glatt has a knockout punch that lands him a spot on a minor-league Canadian hockey team. Starring Seann William Scott, Jay Baruchel, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Watermark
programme.desc: This documentary brings together diverse stories from around the globe and explores our relationship with water and how it shapes humanity. Starring Edward Burtynsky.

programme.title: Tom and Jerrys Giant Adventure
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry encounter a grumpy giant after climbing a beanstalk to a magical land. Starring Garrison Keillor, Paul Reubens, Grey DeLisle.

programme.title: Dolphin Tale
programme.desc: A marine biologist (Harry Connick Jr.), a prosthetics designer (Morgan Freeman) and a boy band together to save the life of a dolphin whose tail was severely damaged in a trap. Starring Harry Connick, Ashley Judd, Nathan Gamble.

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: Mr. Miyagi teaches karate to an angry orphan being bullied at her high school. Starring Hilary Swank, Pat Morita, Michael Ironside.

programme.title: Chasing Liberty
programme.desc: A British man accompanies the teenage daughter of the U.S. president on a European adventure. Starring Mandy Moore, Matthew Goode, Jeremy Piven.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: An actual witch (Nicole Kidman) and a neurotic movie star (Will Ferrell) land the lead roles in a television remake of the 1960s sitcom. Starring Nicole Kidman, Will Ferrell, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: Best in Show
programme.desc: Pampered pooches and their quirky owners converge on Philadelphia to compete in a prestigious dog show. Starring Michael Hitchcock, Parker Posey, Eugene Levy.

programme.title: A Mighty Wind
programme.desc: In order to honor his late father, a man (Bob Balaban) reunites various musicians (Christopher Guest, John Michael Higgins) to perform folk music at a tribute concert. Starring Bob Balaban, Christopher Guest, John Michael Higgins.

programme.title: Night at the Museum
programme.desc: A night watchman (Ben Stiller) at a museum of natural history discovers that exhibits come alive after the building closes. Starring Ben Stiller, Carla Gugino, Dick Van Dyke.

programme.title: The Departed
programme.desc: In Boston an undercover cop gains a gangland chiefs trust, while a career criminal infiltrates the police force for the mob. Starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Matt Damon, Jack Nicholson.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: A rookie police officer meets a corrupt Los Angeles narcotics detective who wants to include him in his schemes. Starring Denzel Washington, Ethan Hawke, Scott Glenn.

programme.title: Incendies
programme.desc: A womans last request sends her twin children to the Middle East to find their roots. Starring Lubna Azabal, Melissa Desormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette.

programme.title: Hairspray
programme.desc: In the 1960s Baltimore a plump teen becomes an overnight celebrity after she wins a spot on a local dance program called "The Corny Collins Show." Starring John Travolta, Nikki Blonsky, Amanda Bynes.

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: A dutiful wife and mother re-examines her veneration of her husband after she finds another womans underwear in his laundry. Starring Sandra Oh, Liane Balaban, Tzi Ma.

programme.title: Racing Stripes
programme.desc: A former horse trainer (Bruce Greenwood) prepares his daughter (Hayden Panettiere) to race a baby zebra against Thoroughbreds. Starring Bruce Greenwood, Hayden Panettiere, M. Emmet Walsh.

programme.title: My Spy
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Sophie catches JJ, a hardened CIA operative, spying on her family during a routine surveillance operation. In exchange for not blowing his cover, JJ begrudgingly agrees to show the precocious girl how to be a spy. Starring Dave Bautista, Kristen Schaal, Parisa Fitz-Henley.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: An anthropologist (Rick Schroder) leads an expedition to an underground world of prehistoric beasts and primitive man. Starring Ricky Schroder, Victoria Pratt, Peter Fonda.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: Sean Anderson partners with his moms husband on a mission to find his grandfather, who is thought to be missing on a mythical island. Starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine, Josh Hutcherson.

programme.title: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A teen awakes within a massive maze with other teens, with no memory of his past other than dreams about an organization known as WCKD. He hopes to escape by piecing together fragments of his past and clues he discovers in the labyrinth. Starring Dylan OBrien, Kaya Scodelario, Aml Ameen.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials
programme.desc: Thomas and his fellow teenage Gladers battle the powerful organization WCKD while facing the perils of the Scorch, a desolate landscape filled with dangerous obstacles and crawling with the virus-infected Cranks. Starring Dylan OBrien, Kaya Scodelario, Giancarlo Esposito.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Starring Dylan OBrien, Thomas Brodie-Sangster, Kaya Scodelario.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Ellen prepares for her wedding day; Julia attempts her escape.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: A self-styled Lothario (Ryan Gosling) teaches a suddenly single 40-something (Steve Carell) how to be a hit with the ladies. Starring Steve Carell, Ryan Gosling, Julianne Moore.

programme.title: Hector and the Search for Happiness
programme.desc: A search by a disillusioned psychiatrist for the key to his happiness takes him around the world on a journey. Starring Simon Pegg, Toni Collette, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Diamond Tongues
programme.desc: Edith dreams of being a successful actress, but cannot land any roles. When she cant figure out what she is doing wrong, she starts to mess everything up. Starring Leah Fay Goldstein, Nick Flanagan, Adam Gurfinkel.

programme.title: Ziegfeld Girl
programme.desc: An elevator operator (Lana Turner), a vaudevillian (Judy Garland) and a violinists wife cope with sudden fame as chorus girls. Starring James Stewart, Judy Garland, Lana Turner.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them. Starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson.

programme.title: Urban Cowboy
programme.desc: A Texas farmer (John Travolta) moves to the city, immerses himself in honky-tonk and falls for a sexy cowgirl (Debra Winger). Starring John Travolta, Debra Winger, Scott Glenn.

programme.title: Varsity Blues
programme.desc: When the star quarterback is injured, a rigid high-school football coach expects an irreverent player to lead the team to victory. Starring James Van Der Beek, Jon Voight, Paul Walker.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: A cattle baron (John Wayne) fights with his foster son (Montgomery Clift) on the first cattle drive up the Chisholm Trail. Starring John Wayne, Montgomery Clift, Walter Brennan.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Judge Roy Bean
programme.desc: A small-time outlaw takes over a town by dispensing his own form of justice and confiscating property for court costs. Starring Paul Newman, Victoria Principal, Anthony Perkins.

programme.title: Interrupted Melody
programme.desc: Australian soprano Marjorie Lawrence (Eleanor Parker) makes a comeback after being disabled by polio. Starring Eleanor Parker, Glenn Ford, Roger Moore.

programme.title: Trial
programme.desc: A publicity-seeking Communist (Arthur Kennedy) dupes a law professor (Glenn Ford) into defending a Mexican teen for murder. Starring Glenn Ford, Dorothy McGuire, Arthur Kennedy.

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: The son of a notorious gunslinger attempts to bury his reputation and avoid his fathers legacy in a small frontier town. Starring Glenn Ford, Jeanne Crain, Broderick Crawford.

programme.title: Day of the Evil Gun
programme.desc: A man (Arthur Kennedy) joins with a gunfighter (Glenn Ford) and a scout (Dean Jagger) to find his wife and children, kidnapped by Apaches. Starring Glenn Ford, Arthur Kennedy, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Gilda
programme.desc: A Buenos Aires casino owner (George Macready) hires a gambler (Glenn Ford) who once had an affair with his alluring wife (Rita Hayworth). Starring Rita Hayworth, Glenn Ford, George Macready.

programme.title: The Big Heat
programme.desc: When his investigation into a corrupt cops suicide spawns a car bombing that takes the life of his wife, Police Sergeant Dave Bannion quits the force to pursue the case on his own. Starring Glenn Ford, Gloria Grahame, Jocelyn Brando.

programme.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Gregory Peck) with two bright children (Mary Badham, Phillip Alford) defends a black man falsely accused of raping a white woman in 1930s Alabama. Starring Gregory Peck, Mary Badham, Phillip Alford.

programme.title: Spellbound
programme.desc: A female psychiatrist (Ingrid Bergman) interprets an amnesiac murder suspects (Gregory Peck) surreal dream. Starring Ingrid Bergman, Gregory Peck, Michael Chekhov.

programme.title: Gentlemans Agreement
programme.desc: A journalist (Gregory Peck) moves to New York City and poses as a Jew to experience anti-Semitism for a magazine article. Starring Gregory Peck, Dorothy McGuire, John Garfield.

programme.title: The Yearling
programme.desc: A pet deer changes a boy (Claude Jarman Jr.) and his parents (Gregory Peck, Jane Wyman), pioneering farmers in Florida after the Civil War. Starring Gregory Peck, Jane Wyman, Claude Jarman.

programme.title: The Valley of Decision
programme.desc: A steel tycoons (Donald Crisp) son (Gregory Peck) loves the family maid, an Irish steelworkers daughter (Greer Garson), in late-1800s Pittsburgh. Starring Greer Garson, Gregory Peck, Donald Crisp.

programme.title: Miracles for Sale
programme.desc: A maker (Robert Young) of illusions for magicians protects an ingenue (Florence Rice) likely to be murdered. Starring Robert Young, Florence Rice, Frank Craven.

programme.title: Mark of the Vampire
programme.desc: An elderly criminologist devises a unique scheme to unmask the killer behind a series of gruesome murders. Starring Lionel Barrymore, Bela Lugosi, Elizabeth Allan.

programme.title: Tarzan, the Ape Man
programme.desc: An English colonels daughter (Joanna Barnes) meets a lord (Denny Miller) of the jungle who makes her his mate. Starring Denny Miller, Joanna Barnes, Cesare Danova.

programme.title: Looney Tunes
programme.desc: The wolf chases down three little pigs.

programme.title: The Opposite Sex
programme.desc: Catty Park Avenue women teach a friend (June Allyson) how to win her husband back from a sexpot (Joan Collins). Starring June Allyson, Joan Collins, Dolores Gray.

programme.title: Oliver Twist
programme.desc: Dickens London waif (John Howard Davies) is pressed into Fagins (Alec Guinness) street gang led by bully Bill Sikes (Robert Newton) and the Artful Dodger. Starring Robert Newton, Alec Guinness, John Davies.

programme.title: Oh, God!
programme.desc: God comes to Earth as an elderly man (George Burns) with a twinkle and picks a supermarket produce manager (John Denver) to spread his word. Starring George Burns, John Denver, Teri Garr.

programme.title: Life Achievement Award: 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Celebrating 50 years of the AFI Life Achievement Award with archival clips and interviews.

programme.title: Fat City
programme.desc: A young fighter (Jeff Bridges) inspires a boozing ex-boxer (Stacy Keach) working as a fruit picker to try a comeback. Starring Stacy Keach, Jeff Bridges, Susan Tyrrell.

programme.title: Inside Moves
programme.desc: A man (John Savage) paralyzed by a suicide attempt meets an injured basketball player (David Morse) and other regulars at a bar. Starring John Savage, David Morse, Diana Scarwid.

programme.title: Drunken Angel
programme.desc: Akira Kurosawas postwar allegory focusing on an alcoholic doctors determination to cure a gangster of tuberculosis. Starring Toshiro Mifune, Takashi Shimura, Reizaburo Yamamoto.

programme.title: Crossing Delancey
programme.desc: A Manhattan single (Amy Irving) meets a man (Peter Riegert) through her Jewish grandmothers (Reizl Bozyk) matchmaker. Starring Amy Irving, Reizl Bozyk, Peter Riegert.

programme.title: Metropolitan
programme.desc: A West Side loner gets a taste of high society when he becomes involved with a group of privileged young Manhattanites. Starring Carolyn Farina, Edward Clements, Chris Eigeman.

programme.title: Hercules, Samson and Ulysses
programme.desc: Hercules (Kirk Morris) and Samson (Richard Lloyd) fight each other, then team up with Ulysses (Enzo Cerusico) against a tyrant. Starring Kirk Morris, Richard Lloyd, Enzo Cerusico.

programme.title: Helen of Troy
programme.desc: Menelaus and Agamemnon lead their Greek hordes against peaceful Troy to recapture the kidnapped queen (Rossana Podesta). Starring Rossana Podesta, Jack Sernas, Cedric Hardwicke.

programme.title: Drunken Angel
programme.desc: Akira Kurosawas postwar allegory focusing on an alcoholic doctors determination to cure a gangster of tuberculosis. Starring Toshiro Mifune, Takashi Shimura, Reizaburo Yamamoto.

programme.title: Strange Lady in Town
programme.desc: A 19th-century doctor meets with public resistance when she tries to establish a medical practice in Santa Fe. Starring Greer Garson, Dana Andrews, Cameron Mitchell.

programme.title: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Dickens orphan Pip (John Mills) goes to London to become a gentleman, thanks to his anonymous benefactor. Starring John Mills, Valerie Hobson, Bernard Miles.

programme.title: Nothing Sacred
programme.desc: A circulation-hungry newspaper brings a terminally ill Vermont woman to New York as a publicity stunt. Starring Carole Lombard, Fredric March, Charles Winninger.

programme.title: Ill Cry Tomorrow
programme.desc: 1930s singer/actress Lillian Roth (Susan Hayward) hits bottom after bad marriages, then joins Alcoholics Anonymous. Starring Susan Hayward, Richard Conte, Eddie Albert.

programme.title: The Searchers
programme.desc: A Confederate veteran and his part-Cherokee partner search five years for a kidnapped girl. Starring John Wayne, Jeffrey Hunter, Natalie Wood.

programme.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: A drifter (John Garfield) stops at a Greek diner and helps the owners (Cecil Kellaway) lusty wife (Lana Turner) become a widow. Starring Lana Turner, John Garfield, Cecil Kellaway.

programme.title: Charley Chase Silent Shorts
programme.desc: Newspaperman Charley pretends to be his exact double to please an old lady hoping to see her son again; little does Charley realize his doppelganger is wanted as a notorious criminal.

programme.title: Forgotten Sweeties
programme.desc: When a mans ex-girlfriend moves into his building with her new husband, the mans wife is not happy about the situation. Starring Charley Chase, Anita Garvin, Mitchell Lewis.

programme.title: Charley Chase Silent Shorts
programme.desc: Charley is mistaken for a jewel thief by a socialite who tries to entrap him at a society party.

programme.title: Anna and the Wolves
programme.desc: A foreign governess named Ana arrives at an isolated home to take charge of the education of the children of the family that lives in the mansion. Starring Geraldine Chaplin, Fernando Fernán Gomez, Jose María Prada.

programme.desc: A documentary detailing the case of Mary Ellen Johnson-Davis, a Native American woman who disappeared in 2020. Her story exposes how hundreds of indigenous women continue to go missing in the USA, perpetuating trans-generational traumas.

programme.title: How Not to Hire a Hitman
programme.desc: New couple Leon and Valerie have one unfortunate thing in common, they both hate their exes; when Leons ex-wife and Valeries ex-husband are targeted for murder, it becomes a case of he said/she said.

programme.title: Barons
programme.desc: Dani struggles to get a loan to open her own surf shop and is confronted when a secret lover shows up in town; Hunter makes headway with LightWave USA; Buddys jealousy jeopardizes Kellys acting career.

programme.title: Daughter of the Bride
programme.desc: A daughter tries to sabotage her mothers wedding while navigating her own love life and career. Starring Marcia Gay Harden, Halston Sage, Andrew Richardson.

programme.title: Pins and Needles
programme.desc: What should have been an uneventful ride back to campus unexpectedly becomes a nightmare as Max, a diabetic, biology grad student, is entrapped in a diabolical new-age wellness experiment. Starring Chelsea Clark, Kate Corbett, Ryan James McDonald.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A wealthy attorney, a secluded estate, and a masked intruder with a deadly plan,..

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A beloved teacher is brutally murdered in her own home just days before Christmas, leaving a community in shock; for 25 years, the case remains unsolved, until an unexpected break in DNA technology reveals a connection no one sees coming.

programme.title: Tootoo
programme.desc: Jordin Tootoos life has been predicated on his determination to rise above every challenge he has faced including the extraordinary pressure of being the first Inuk player in the NHL, addiction and tragic personal loss.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: In Erie, Pennsylvania, things end horrifically when regional FBI Agent Jerry Clark arrives on the scene of a bank robbery in progress. When a bomb goes off, killing a pizza delivery person, it leads to a convoluted trail of clues.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: Ramon Sosa, a former boxer, marries Lulu and finds himself in the fight of his life; Ramon gets forced into drastic action when he receives a warning that his wife is hiring a hit man.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A family of four takes a cruise of a lifetime, but only three return home; their desperate search for their missing adult daughter begins, with all signs pointing to a kidnapping.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A scratch and win ticket unveils an all-expense paid cruise for a young couple; but their luck runs out once aboard the ship as one of them ends up murdered.

programme.title: Emily
programme.desc: Emily Brontë struggles within the confines of her life, yearning for artistic and personal freedom. She finds romance before writing her seminal novel, "Wuthering Heights." Starring Emma Mackey, Fionn Whitehead, Oliver Jackson-Cohen.

programme.title: Mommys Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Mallorys life turns upside-down when her young son, Billy, is drawn to Samantha, a strange woman who whispers to him at the local climbing gym. Billy refuses to reveal Samanthas message and starts acting up. Starring Tammin Sursok, Nathanael Vass, Rami Kahlon.

programme.title: The Bad Guardian
programme.desc: When Leighs father, Jason, suffers a fall, the courts assign him a guardian named Janet to help. But when Janet takes over every aspect of Jasons life, Leigh must find the strength to take down the guardian and the corrupt system that supports her. Starring Melissa Joan Hart, La La Anthony, Luis Bordonada.

programme.title: Tootoo
programme.desc: Jordin Tootoos life has been predicated on his determination to rise above every challenge he has faced including the extraordinary pressure of being the first Inuk player in the NHL, addiction and tragic personal loss.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: A young police officer discovers the dark secret hidden in a neighborhood restaurant.

programme.title: Fog of War
programme.desc: At the height of WWII, a couple stranded on a remote estate become aware of a Nazi spy hiding among them. Unsure who to trust, they must uncover the spys identity as the outcome of the war hangs precariously in the balance. Starring John Cusack, Jake Abel, Brianna Hildebrand.

programme.title: The Channel
programme.desc: When a bank heist goes wrong, a desperate criminal, his out-of-control brother and a motley crew of ex-Marines must escape from New Orleans and a determined FBI agent. Starring Clayne Crawford, Max Martini, Nicoye Banks.

programme.desc: Jordin Tootoos life has been predicated on his determination to rise above every challenge he has faced including the extraordinary pressure of being the first Inuk player in the NHL, addiction and tragic personal loss.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A young man, an attack on a quiet sidewalk and a case that went cold for decades; lies, fear and silence kept the truth buried, until witnesses finally spoke, unraveling a mystery that haunted a family and a city for 25 years.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: In Pensacola, Florida, ex-cop and private investigator, Taylor Wright, is moving into a new home with the love of her life when she inexplicably disappears without a trace; it appears at first as if she may have simply run away.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: After police discovers Melinda Pleskovic dead in her home just days before her daughters wedding, police turn to her future son-in-law when his story doesnt seem to add up; he has news of his own, break-ins at the Pleskovic home reveal the culprit.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A home invader ties Samantha up while kidnapping and murdering her husband; as Samantha explains what happened to her, it turns out that there may be more to this crime than there seems.

programme.title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
programme.desc: Kidnapped, assaulted and held captive for 18 hours, 15-year-old Kara Robinson plots a daring escape from a serial killers apartment. Starring Katie Douglas, Cara Buono, Kristian Bruun.

programme.title: The Girl Locked Upstairs: The Tanya Kach Story
programme.desc: Feeling isolated and lonely, 14-year-old Tanya Kach befriends Tom Hose, a school security guard who lures her to his home. Held captive and abused for 10 years, Tanya eventually finds the courage to take a dangerous step toward freedom. Starring Robert Baker, Jordyn Ashley Olson.

programme.title: Targeted for Murder
programme.desc: In Pensacola, Florida, ex-cop and private investigator, Taylor Wright, is moving into a new home with the love of her life when she inexplicably disappears without a trace; it appears at first as if she may have simply run away.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A home invader ties Samantha up while kidnapping and murdering her husband; as Samantha explains what happened to her, it turns out that there may be more to this crime than there seems.

programme.title: Little Girl in the Woods
programme.desc: While backpacking in the deep woods, members of a womens bereavement support group must band together to save a teenage girl whos being held captive in a cabin. Starring Alana Hawley Purvis, Camille Atebe, Caitlin Stryker.

programme.title: Kidnapped to the Island
programme.desc: A shady singer lures a star-struck teen to a faraway island with promises of fame and fortune. But when it turns out to be a sex-trafficking ring, her desperate mother embarks on a daring crusade to save her. Starring Gina Holden, Mozart Dee, Aaron Schwartz.

programme.title: Eve of Abduction
programme.desc: When a single mother becomes engaged, she receives an anonymous threat -- either break off the engagement or her daughter will be kidnapped. Starring Sarah Lind, Robb Derringer, Braeden Carl.

programme.title: Amber Alert
programme.desc: A rideshare becomes a high-stakes game of cat and mouse when Jaq and Shane receive an Amber Alert on their phones. When they spot the kidnappers car with the girl in the back seat, they desperately race against time to save her before its too late. Starring Hayden Panettiere, Tyler James Williams, Kevin Dunn.

programme.title: Vanished in an Instant
programme.desc: Megans teenage daughter, Whitney, disappears after their car breaks down at a gas station. As a shadowy figure traps Whitney in a deadly game of survival, Megan scrambles to uncover the truth before shes lost forever. Starring Vinessa Antoine, Arista Arhin, Aaron Poole.

programme.title: Aliens Abducted My Parents and Now I Feel Kinda Left Out
programme.desc: High school journalist Itsy befriends her space-obsessed neighbor Calvin. After he convinces her that his parents were abducted by aliens, together they concoct a plan to get them back. Starring Emma Tremblay, Jacob Buster, Will Forte.

programme.title: Vanished in an Instant

programme.title: Barber
programme.desc: A wealthy widow hires private investigator Val Barber to find her missing granddaughter. As dark secrets start to surface, Barber finds himself entangled with shady and powerful men who are determind to thwart his investigation. Starring Aidan Gillen, Aisling Kearns, Gary Lydon.

programme.title: The Last Video Store
programme.desc: A cursed VHS tape unleashes classic cinematic villains into the real world. Starring Kevin Martin, Yaayaa Adams, Matthew Kennedy.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A quiet Tennessee couple returns home to a nightmare, burglars lurking in the shadows, a home invasion turning deadly.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Sydney Loofes vibrant life takes a tragic turn in November 2017 when she enters the world of online dating and unknowingly crosses paths with Bailey Boswell and Aubrey Trail; as their second date approaches, the couple hatches a sinister plan.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Denita Smith, a 25-year-old graduate student in North Carolina, is murdered on January 4, 2007; before her tragic death, Shannon Crawley, who had a complicated history with Denitas fiance, Jermeir Stroud, became extremely jealous.

programme.title: Know Her Name
programme.desc: Delving into the legacy of filmmakers and uncovers the mystery of why women, especially from underrepresented communities - like Zora Neale Hurston and Esther Eng were - have been erased through historical amnesia.

programme.title: If I Cant Have You
programme.desc: Disc jockey Michelle Hall attracts the amorous attention of an unknown, demented fan. Meanwhile, back at home, her nosy neighbor seems to watch and know every move she makes. Starring Jackee Harry, Bailey Kai, Gina Hiraizumi.

programme.title: A Chefs Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town and opens her own gourmet restaurant after escaping from an abusive relationship.
